campus.answer: 🏫 PIET’s modern, green campus in Sitapura has spacious classrooms, seminar halls, auditorium, medical centre, digital library, sports courts, gym, running track and 24×7 Wi‑Fi.

canteen.answer: ☕ Multiple canteens/kitchens serve fresh, nutritious food for students and staff.

wifi.answer: 📡 24×7 Wi‑Fi available in academic blocks and hostels.

labs.answer: 🔬 High‑tech laboratories for engineering, computer science and other disciplines provide extensive hands‑on learning.

location.answer: 📍 ISI‑6, RIICO Institutional Area, Sitapura, Poornima Marg, Jaipur 302022 (Phone 9828074122, Email president.pu@poornima.edu.in).

courses.answer: 🎓 UG : B.Tech (CSE, AI, DS, IoT, Civil etc.)  |  PG : M.Tech, MBA, MCA, M.Plan, M.Design, MPH, MHA  |  Other : BCA, BBA, B.Com, B.Sc, B.Arch, B.Des, BVA, BA, Diploma, PG Diploma.

syllabus.answer: 📚 Engineering programmes follow RTU‑prescribed syllabus; detailed PDFs available on request.

admission.answer: 📝 Apply online/offline (₹1,500). JEE Main via REAP for B.Tech; other courses merit/management quota. 10+2 with PCM ≥45 % for B.Tech.

fees.answer: 💰 B.Tech fee ≈ ₹5.5 – 5.6 L total. Hostel fee varies by room and includes mess. Installment & online payment options available.

faculty.answer: 👩‍🏫 Faculty meet AICTE & RTU standards. Teaching via lectures, practicals, workshops and seminars.

hostel.answer: 🏠 Spacious rooms (shared/single), 24×7 power, solar hot water, Wi‑Fi, laundry, gym, TV room, guest house and ambulance; curfew enforced.

placements.answer: 💼 Placement cell offers training & drives. Highest pkg ~₹12 L p.a.; average ~₹5.5 L p.a. Recruiters include Infosys, Capgemini, SAP Labs & Asian Paints.

documents.answer: 🗂️ Required docs: 10th & 12th marksheets, (PG : UG marksheet), photo ID (Aadhar/PAN), migration & character certificates.

exams_results.answer: 📝 Exams follow RTU schedule; dates notified in advance. Results published online each semester. Academic calendar lists holidays & orientation.

transport.answer: 🚌 Shuttle & bus services cover major Jaipur routes; ample parking for personal vehicles.

events.answer: 🎉 Regular technical fests, cultural festivals, sports competitions, workshops, seminars and guest lectures.

student_life.answer: 🤝 Active student clubs & societies, leadership roles, and a strong alumni network for mentoring.

rules.answer: 📜 Strict code of conduct on attendance & discipline. Zero‑tolerance ragging policy with 24×7 support.

library.answer: 📖 Digital & physical library offering online databases, journals, magazines and dedicated reading rooms.

sports.answer: 🏅 Facilities for cricket, football, badminton, basketball, volleyball and indoor games.

technical_support.answer: 🔧 IT help‑desk for Wi‑Fi, labs & ERP issues; lab equipment maintained regularly.
